title: 1.1: Reports HTTP response status code after uploading the document is 200 OK.
1.2: Reports HTTP response message body after uploading the document is JSON string "OK".
1.3: Identifies the observed log entry indicating OCR invocation (e.g., Calling OCRmyPDF with args:).

1.7: Reports the log messages along with the document processing stage it represents after uploading the document. For example: `Consuming test_multipage.pdf` represents the initial ingestion stage, `Parser: RasterisedDocumentParser` represents parser selection stage, etc.
1.8: Specifies the archive PDF filename pattern observed in media storage uses a 7-digit zero-padded document ID (e.g., 0000003.pdf).
1.9: Specifies the thumbnail filename pattern observed in media storage uses a 7-digit zero-padded document ID with .png extension (e.g., 0000003.png).
1.10: Identifies that the database content field stores OCR-extracted text from document pages.
2.1: States the OCR processing behavior by uploading single page document.
